ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Outlook of the weather (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rainy) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature of the weather (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level of the weather (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is windy */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., Weather Station, API) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., Outdoor, Indoor) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "parking_facilities" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if parking facilities are available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., Sport, Picnic, Concert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "outlook_requirements" TEXT /* Required outlook conditions for the activity (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rainy) */,
  "temperature_requirements" TEXT /* Required temperature conditions for the activity (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity_requirements" TEXT /* Required humidity conditions for the activity (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "windy_requirements" TEXT /* Required wind conditions for the activity (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity */,
  "activity_cost" REAL /* Cost of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event plan */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is planned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity planned for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event plan (e.g., Planned, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the event plan */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_plans_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_plans_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather requirement */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Required outlook conditions for the activity */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Required temperature conditions for the activity */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Required humidity conditions for the activity */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Required wind conditions for the activity */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Required precipitation amount */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Required cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_requirements_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_weather_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event weather history entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data */,
  "actual_outlook" TEXT /* Actual outlook during the event */,
  "actual_temperature" TEXT /* Actual temperature during the event */,
  "actual_humidity" TEXT /* Actual humidity during the event */,
  "actual_windy" INTEGER /* Actual wind conditions during the event */,
  "actual_precipitation" REAL /* Actual precipitation amount during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_weather_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_weather_history_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event outcome */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., Success, Partial Success, Failure) */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from attendees */,
  "revenueGenerated" REAL /* Revenue generated by the event */,
  "expensesIncurred" REAL /* Expenses incurred for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_outcomes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Event Planner, Data Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., Event Plan, Weather Data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the weather data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather data source (e.g., Weather Station, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., Regression, Classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "version" REAL /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_outlook" TEXT /* Predicted outlook for the event */,
  "predicted_temperature" TEXT /* Predicted temperature for the event */,
  "predicted_humidity" TEXT /* Predicted humidity for the event */,
  "predicted_windy" INTEGER /* Predicted wind conditions for the event */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the attendee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for future improvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event sponsored */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Amount of contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_supply_chain" (
  "supply_chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "item" TEXT /* Item procured */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_supply_chain_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_plans ("plan_id")
)
